title: Alex's Mobs Spectre to Spectral Kite
description: Renames the Spectre from the mod Alex's Mobs to Spectral Kite. I did this to ensure compatibility between Spectre from the mod Species.
body: Renames the Spectre from the mod Alex's Mobs to Spectral Kite. I did this to ensure compatibility between Spectre from the mod Species.![From Spectre to Spectral Kite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320870e5c7b137e4f490b2035f538115bf23892b.png) You can free use this Resource Pack in your Modpacks, if you use mods like Alex's Mobs and Species.
